subject: fix(debug): remove dead badge code, await clipboard, fix duplicate React keys
body:
Three bugs found during thorough code audit:

1. index.html: __debugPushError referenced non-existent element
   'debug-pre-error-count' — dead code from pattern's visible inline pill
   (not implemented). Removed the getElementById/badge lines.

2. DebugPill.jsx: copyToClipboard is async but was not awaited. The
   'report-copied' log entry fired immediately regardless of success.
   Now awaits the result and logs 'report-copied' (success severity) or
   'report-copy-failed' (warn severity) accurately.

3. debugLog.js: clearEntries reset nextId to 1, causing duplicate React
   keys when new entries were added after clearing (new IDs collided with
   stale entries in React state). nextId now stays monotonically increasing
   for the page lifetime.

Tags: debug, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
